green: operations confirm and old compatibility confirm expose the required core response fields
no shadow business facts appear in official ledger or domain event tables
shadow command idempotency keys do not conflict with active fact payload hashes
yellow: database-level projector namespace check unavailable while source check is clean
red: same idempotency key maps to different command payload hashes

checks.description: Official projector code and projection checkpoints must not consume shadow_runtime.
checks.red_when: official projector source references shadow_runtime or projection_checkpoints.source_namespace = shadow_runtime
checks.yellow_when: projection checkpoint DB check cannot run but source scan is clean

checks.description: Shadow command submissions must preserve idempotency and payload-hash consistency with active facts.
checks.red_when: same tenant and idempotency key maps to multiple payload hashes, or active fact payload hash conflicts
checks.yellow_when: active fact row exists for the idempotency key but lacks a comparable payload hash

checks.description: Operations confirm and old compatibility confirm must expose the same core response fields.
checks.red_when: workItemId, submissionId, commitStatus, or projectionStatus is missing

checks.description: Shadow ledger entries and shadow domain events must not be present in official business fact tables.
checks.red_when: shadow ledger entries appear in public ledger tables or shadow domain events appear in public domain_events
checks.yellow_when: display-only or optional non-fact evidence differs
